product.name: GridSight
product.tagline: AI-Powered Grid Balancing for German TSOs
product.problem: German TSOs spend EUR 4.2B/year on redispatch. Inaccurate renewable forecasts force expensive last-minute grid interventions.
product.solution: LightGBM quantile models trained on 5 years of SMARD + Open-Meteo data reduce forecast error by up to 60%, enabling proactive congestion management.
product.hero_stat: 60.1% wind forecast improvement over persistence baseline
